COMPUTER SCIENCE & ENGINEERING

CSE 143 Computer Programming II (5) NSc, RSN
Continuation of CSE 142. Course equivalent to: CSS 143 and TCSS 143. Course overlaps with: CSE 122; CSE 123; and T INFO 473. Prerequisite: CSE 142. Offered: AWSpS. View course details in MyPlan: CSE 143

CSE 4XX Evidence-Preserving Systems (3-5) DIV
Builds bounded academic data systems. Prerequisite: CSE 143 and INFO 200. Open only to Seattle students. Offered: jointly with INFO 4XX.

CSE 399 CSE Foreign Study (*)
Credit varies by approved study-abroad work. Credit/no-credit only.
